title: VIDEO overview page » Preview IMAGES
user_story:
As a visitor
I want to see a preview image for each VIDEO on the overview page
So I can quickly find a specific one without knowing its name
description:
* each VIDEO item on the VIDEO overview page contains a preview image
* the 'preview image' refers to what is known as 'prime image' in the API
* the preview image is displayed in thumbnail size
* when a VIDEO has no prime image then the preview image shows the default fallback image
